x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Dependency updater tool that processes dependency updates based on configuration files.

commands.name: AzureDevOps
commands.description: Updates dependencies in Azure DevOps repositories.

options.name: --organization
options.description: The name of the Azure DevOps organization (e.g., 'contoso').

options.name: --project
options.description: The Azure DevOps project that contains the target repository.

options.name: --repository
options.description: The name of the Azure DevOps Git repository to operate on.

options.name: --pat
options.description: The Azure DevOps personal access token used for authentication.

options.name: --account-id
options.description: The Azure DevOps user or service account ID used for API access.

options.name: --nuget-project
options.description: The Azure DevOps project that contains the NuGet artifacts feed.

options.name: --nuget-feed-id
options.description: The ID of the Azure Artifacts NuGet feed used for dependency resolution.

options.name: --nuget-service-host
options.description: The internal Azure DevOps service host identifier used when accessing upstream package data.

options.name: --access-token-resource-id
options.description: The Azure Active Directory resource ID used to acquire access tokens for upstream ingestion.

options.name: --az-side-car-address
options.description: The URL address for AZ sidecar service, used to fetch Azure DevOps access-token.

options.name: --az-side-car-token
options.description: The token for AZ sidecar service, used to fetch Azure DevOps access-token.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --owner
options.description: The GitHub repository owner (organization or user account name).

options.name: --repository
options.description: The name of the GitHub repository to operate on.

options.name: --token
options.description: The GitHub personal access token (PAT) used for authentication.

options.name: --authentication-proxy-address
options.description: Optional HTTP(S) proxy address for GitHub API authentication. When set, PR creation requests are routed through this proxy to overcome GitHub limitations.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --directory
options.description: The path to the local Git repository where dependencies will be updated. [default: <path>]

options.name: --git-username
options.description: The username used for authenticating with the remote Git repository.

options.name: --git-password
options.description: The password or personal access token used for authenticating with the remote Git repository.

options.name: --reset-cache
options.description: Clears the internal dependency cache before processing updates.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information
